overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a leather trench coat walking through a rainy urban environment. The character navigates from a main commercial street through intersections and into a graffiti-covered back alley, with overcast skies and wet reflective surfaces throughout.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a tree-lined sidewalk with a stone building on the right. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk ahead, and an Albion banner is visible in the distance as the red brick warehouse recedes behind.

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open urban plaza, crossing intersections with yellow grid markings. A newsagent building and clock tower become visible while vehicles including a beige car and pink scooter pass through the intersection.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow back alleyway with walls covered in graffiti. The space is enclosed with a parked white van and piles of trash bags visible. Orange construction barriers block part of the path ahead as the character continues through the debris-strewn alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban district that shifts from an industrial commercial zone to a more refined, tree-lined street. It begins with the character walking along a wet sidewalk beside a large red brick warehouse as a white delivery van passes by on the road. As the character crosses the street near a bus stop shelter filled with advertisements, the industrial backdrop begins to recede. The scene then opens onto a sidewalk lined with trees and a stone building, where pedestrians with umbrellas move ahead through the rain. The camera continues forward, leaving the warehouse behind and moving toward a distant Albion banner visible down the street.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, bustling urban plaza into the claustrophobic confines of a gritty back alley. It begins by tracking the character across open intersections marked with yellow grids, passing a newsagent and a clock tower as a beige car and pink scooter navigate the traffic. As the character moves away from the main thoroughfare, the open cityscape narrows and shifts into a secluded alleyway defined by walls covered in graffiti. The scene then tightens further, passing a parked white van and piles of trash bags before the path is partially obstructed by orange construction barriers. Finally, the camera continues forward through the debris-strewn corridor, leaving the brightness of the plaza behind for the enclosed urban decay.
